subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! The Ancient Sun and the Most Great Luminary hath risen from the horizon of the world and encompassed all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله قد اشرق شمس القدم و النیر الاعظم من افق العالم و احاط
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
